creator: mons@cpan.org
text:
On Tuesday 15 December 2009 09:54:09 Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of devel/p5-common-sense,
>
> Please note that PR ports/141534 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/141534

Approved

-- 
Mons Anderson aka Vladimir Perepelitsa
